---
name: Tool Request
about: Suggest a new tool to be added
title: '[TOOL] Add '
labels: enhancement, tool-request
assignees: ''
---

## Tool Information

**Tool Name**:
**Official Website**:
**GitHub/Source**:

## Description
What does this tool do? (1-2 sentences)

## Why Should It Be Included?
How does this tool help developers or DevOps engineers?

## Installation Method
How is this tool installed?

- [ ] Homebrew formula: `brew install ____`
- [ ] Homebrew cask: `brew install --cask ____`
- [ ] pip: `pip install ____`
- [ ] npm: `npm install -g ____`
- [ ] Other: ____

## Suggested Package Tier
Which package should include this tool?

- [ ] **Light** - Essential, everyone needs it
- [ ] **Standard** - Useful for most developers
- [ ] **Advanced** - For power users/specific use cases

## Which Module?
Where should this tool be added?

- [ ] 02-dev-tools (editors, terminals)
- [ ] 03-languages (programming languages)
- [ ] 04-devops-tools (Docker, K8s, cloud)
- [ ] 05-cli-tools (command-line utilities)
- [ ] 06-network-tools (networking, security)
- [ ] 07-communication (chat, video)
- [ ] 08-ai-tools (AI/ML, LLMs)
- [ ] 09-browsers (web browsers)
- [ ] 10-databases (databases, clients)
- [ ] 11-optional-apps (productivity, utilities)

## Additional Context
Any other information about this tool.

## Willing to Contribute?
- [ ] I can submit a PR to add this tool
- [ ] I need help adding this tool
